title: Rich Kenyan Fish Pasta
description: A rich and tender pescatarian dish featuring pappardelle pasta, sous-vide cooked fish, and a blend of Kenyan spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the tilapia fillets with salt, black pepper, and kenyan spice blend.
Place the tilapia fillets in a sous-vide bag and seal.
Cook the tilapia in the sous-vide machine for 30 minutes.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook until they release their juices.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Drain the cooked pappardelle pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the tomato sauce.
To serve, place a cooked tilapia fillet on top of the pasta and garnish with chopped parsley.
